channel.title: PYT Radar
channel.description: Podcast & YouTube Tracking — automated episode digest. Tracking mentions of Karen Bass, Nithya Raman, and more across podcasts and YouTube.

item.title: Veritas Imperium: This episode of Adam Carolla's show discusses the LA Times owner's statement tha
item.description:
Veritas Imperium
"LA Times Says Supporting Karen Bass Was a Misstep | Adam Carolla Show News - Daily Podcast" – Published 2026-03-20

Match: Karen Bass (guest)

Sentiment: Negative

This episode of Adam Carolla's show discusses the LA Times owner's statement that endorsing Karen Bass for LA mayor was a mistake due to her incompetence in handling the recent LA fires. The hosts criticize Bass's leadership and contrast her with Rick Caruso, who they argue would have been more pragmatic.

Key moment at 05:50: "The LA Times owner says endorsing Karen Bass was a mistake due to incompetence." – Speaker A

▶ Watch Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript

item.title: Kamal (The Shadowban Man) Johnson: This episode discusses LA Mayor Karen Bass's announcement of $1 million in fundi
item.description:
Kamal (The Shadowban Man) Johnson
"Jack Harlow Feels Blacker|LA Mayor Karen Bass Homeless Problem Update + More" – Published 2026-03-19

Match: Karen Bass (guest)

Sentiment: Negative

This episode discusses LA Mayor Karen Bass's announcement of $1 million in funding to prevent homelessness in Little Tokyo, which the host criticizes as helping Asian communities while ignoring the higher rates of Black homelessness in LA. The host views this as evidence that politicians can help specific groups but choose not to help Black Americans.

Key moment at 20:37: "This woman is from our lineage but not helping out the lineage. She helping out Asian folks." – Speaker A

▶ Watch Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript

item.title: Lincoln Square: LA Mayor Karen Bass discusses her administration's response to Trump-era ICE enf
item.description:
Lincoln Square
"LA Mayor Karen Bass Sounds Alarm on Trump’s ICE Tactics" – Published 2026-03-26

Match: Karen Bass (guest)

Sentiment: Mixed

LA Mayor Karen Bass discusses her administration's response to Trump-era ICE enforcement tactics in Los Angeles. She explains her executive directive to limit ICE operations and describes the escalating brutality of immigration raids under the Trump administration.

Key moment at 03:54: "I would have never imagined that I have to protect myself from my own government." – Karen Bass

▶ Watch Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript

item.title: Rae for LA: This is Rae Huang's own podcast episode where she hosts Nick Caputo to discuss L
item.description:
Rae for LA
"A conversation with LA mayoral candidate Rae Huang and Nick Caputo of Livable Advanced LA" – Published 2026-03-25

Match: Rae Huang (guest)

Sentiment: Positive

This is Rae Huang's own podcast episode where she hosts Nick Caputo to discuss LA's charter reform process. Rae is the host/interviewer discussing civic engagement and governmental reform as part of her mayoral campaign platform.

Key moment at 01:24: "A lot of folks recently saw me go viral. I was going to give public comment to the Charter Reform Commission and I got cut off immediately" – Rae Huang

▶ Watch Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript

item.title: John Kobylt Show & John Kobylt Radio: Spencer Pratt appears as an in-studio guest for the full hour on the John Kobylt
item.description:
John Kobylt Show & John Kobylt Radio
"LA Mayoral Candidate Spencer Pratt In Studio Interview With John Kobylt" – Published 2026-03-27

Match: Spencer Pratt (guest)

Sentiment: Positive

Spencer Pratt appears as an in-studio guest for the full hour on the John Kobylt Show, discussing his mayoral campaign for Los Angeles. He presents himself as the accountability candidate challenging incumbent Karen Bass and Nithia Ramen, focusing heavily on homelessness, law enforcement, and city corruption.

Key moment at 03:12: "I'm so excited to be running for mayor because I'm going to show them there are consequences and there are enough angry taxpayers, they're going to say, 'No more. You're done, Mayor Bass.'" – Spencer Pratt

▶ Watch Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript

item.title: Off the Vine: Spencer Pratt appears as a guest on Kaitlyn Bristowe's podcast to discuss his ne
item.description:
Off the Vine with Kaitlyn Bristowe
"Spencer Pratt | Creating A Villain, His New Memoir, & Running For LA Mayor!" – Published 2026-03-24

Match: Spencer Pratt (guest)

Sentiment: Positive

Spencer Pratt appears as a guest on Kaitlyn Bristowe's podcast to discuss his new memoir 'The Guy You Love to Hate.' The wide-ranging conversation covers his reality TV villain persona, life experiences from The Hills, recent house fire tragedy, and his campaign for LA mayor.

Key moment at 52:26: "I would rather have my house and my hummingbirds back than this book and running for mayor." – Spencer Pratt

▶ Watch Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript

item.title: Pat Brown Institute at Cal State LA: This is an in-depth interview with Adam Miller, a mayoral candidate for Los Ange
item.description:
Pat Brown Institute at Cal State LA
"On the Record with Adam Miller" – Published 2026-03-25

Match: Adam Miller (guest)

Sentiment: Neutral

This is an in-depth interview with Adam Miller, a mayoral candidate for Los Angeles, discussing his background as an entrepreneur and nonprofit leader, and his vision for fixing the city's problems through better leadership and management.

Key moment at 05:02: "The city needs to be fixed and we need a builder to fix it. And I'm that builder." – Adam Miller

▶ Watch Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript

item.title: Bloomberg Podcasts: This Bloomberg podcast episode features an interview with Los Angeles Mayor Kare
item.description:
Bloomberg Podcasts
"Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass Talks Public Transit | Bloomberg Talks" – Published 2026-03-28

Match: Karen Bass (guest)

Sentiment: Positive

This Bloomberg podcast episode features an interview with Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass discussing various challenges facing the city including high gas prices, housing affordability, public transit, and major upcoming events. Bass speaks extensively about her administration's progress on homelessness reduction, public safety improvements, and preparations for hosting the World Cup and Olympics.

Key moment at 08:11: "We've had a decrease in street homelessness of 18%." – Karen Bass

▶ Watch Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript

item.title: The John Phillips Show: This episode of The John Phillips Show focuses on government transparency issues
item.description:
The John Phillips Show
"Ashley Zavala confronts the lack of transparency at the Capitol Annex Project" – Published 2026-03-26

Match: Karen Bass (guest)

Sentiment: Negative

This episode of The John Phillips Show focuses on government transparency issues in California, particularly Ashley Zavala's investigation into the secretive Capitol Annex Project. Karen Bass is mentioned briefly in relation to LA's homelessness crisis when responding to the 'Sewer Lady' story.

Key moment at 27:29: "You're the mayor. This is your number one issue. Number one, not two, not three, not four. Number one. And you failed." – Speaker B

▶ Listen to Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript

item.title: Freshly Pop'd: This episode of Freshly Pop'd discusses Spencer Pratt's mayoral campaign for Los
item.description:
Freshly Pop'd
"Rap's dogpiling problem + Hannah Montana 20th anniversary, Spencer Pratt for LA mayor?" – Published 2026-03-24

Match: Spencer Pratt (guest)

Sentiment: Negative

This episode of Freshly Pop'd discusses Spencer Pratt's mayoral campaign for Los Angeles, with hosts critically analyzing his political platform and qualifications. The hosts express strong skepticism about his candidacy and compare him unfavorably to other political outsiders.

Key moment at 00:56: "Spencer Pratt is a villain." – Sequoia Holmes

▶ Watch Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript

item.title: Bloomberg Podcasts: Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass appears as a guest on Bloomberg Talks to discuss va
item.description:
Bloomberg Podcasts
"Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass Talks Public Transit | Bloomberg Talks" – Published 2026-03-28

Match: Karen Bass (guest)

Sentiment: Positive

Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass appears as a guest on Bloomberg Talks to discuss various city challenges and initiatives. She addresses topics ranging from gas prices and public transit to homelessness, housing construction, the entertainment industry, and upcoming major sporting events.

Key moment at 08:11: "We've had a decrease in street homelessness of 18%." – Karen Bass

item.title: Bloomberg Podcasts: This Bloomberg podcast episode features Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass as a guest
item.description:
Bloomberg Podcasts
"Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass Talks Public Transit | Bloomberg Talks" – Published 2026-03-28

Match: Karen Bass (guest)

Sentiment: Positive

This Bloomberg podcast episode features Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass as a guest discussing key city issues including public transit, gas prices, housing affordability, Hollywood industry challenges, and upcoming major sporting events. Bass speaks directly about her administration's policies and achievements during her first term as mayor.

Key moment at 08:09: "We've had a decrease in street homelessness of 18%. This is a dysfunctional system that has been dysfunctional for at least the last three decades." – Karen Bass

▶ Watch Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript

item.description:
Bloomberg Podcasts
"Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass Talks Public Transit | Bloomberg Talks" – Published 2026-03-28

Match: Karen Bass (guest)

Sentiment: Positive

Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass appears as a guest on Bloomberg Talks to discuss her administration's policies and challenges. She addresses key issues facing LA including high gas prices, housing development, entertainment industry concerns, and upcoming major events like the World Cup and Olympics.

Key moment at 08:15: "We've had a decrease in street homelessness of 18%. This is a dysfunctional system that has been dysfunctional for at least the last three decades." – Karen Bass

item.title: Bloomberg Podcasts: Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass appears as a guest on Bloomberg Talks to discuss he
item.description:
Bloomberg Podcasts
"Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass Talks Public Transit | Bloomberg Talks" – Published 2026-03-28

Match: Karen Bass (guest)

Sentiment: Neutral

Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass appears as a guest on Bloomberg Talks to discuss her administration's policies and initiatives. She addresses key city challenges including gas prices, housing, homelessness, public safety, and preparation for major events like the World Cup and Olympics.

Key moment at 07:48: "I am proud to say that after year after year of homelessness increasing in the national trend, frankly, was an increase in homelessness of 18%. We've had the exact opposite in Los Angeles, where we've had a decrease in street homelessness of 18%." – Karen Bass

▶ Watch Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript

item.title: 3 Martini Lunch – Political Humor & Commentary: This episode discusses the LA wildfires response and upcoming mayoral race, with
item.description:
3 Martini Lunch – Political Humor & Commentary
"The Dystopian Future the "No Kings" Protestors Really Want | Guest Host: Nick Freitas" – Published 2026-03-30

Match: Karen Bass (guest)

Sentiment: Negative

This episode discusses the LA wildfires response and upcoming mayoral race, with hosts criticizing Mayor Karen Bass's handling of the crisis and her communist connections. Karen Bass is mentioned as a target of criticism regarding her disaster response and past trips to Cuba.

Key moment at 07:48: "If we look at what Karen Bass was doing 20 years ago, she was in Cuba learning how to make bombs with the people that would then go bomb Capitol Hill." – Spencer Pratt

▶ Listen to Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript

item.title: The Jesse Lee Peterson Radio Show: This episode of Jesse Lee Peterson's radio show focuses on giving up belief syst
item.description:
The Jesse Lee Peterson Radio Show
"Give Up Belief | JLP Mon 3-30-26" – Published 2026-03-30

Match: Karen Bass (guest)

Sentiment: Negative

This episode of Jesse Lee Peterson's radio show focuses on giving up belief systems and overcoming anger, with Karen Bass mentioned in the context of Los Angeles protests and leadership criticism. Bass appears as a news clip discussing protest concerns, not as a guest.

Key moment at 50:00: "And what Karen Bass gonna do? She monitoring. Oh, I'm so scared now. I'm concerned, I'm worried. Mama is in charge." – Speaker A

▶ Listen to Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript

item.title: Chicks on The Right - Conservative Politics & Culture Commentary: This episode of 'Chicks on The Right' covers various conservative political topi
item.description:

Sentiment: Neutral

This episode of 'Chicks on The Right' covers various conservative political topics including No Kings protests, Cardinal Pizzaballa controversy, and a feud between Megyn Kelly and Mark Levin. Spencer Pratt does not appear on this episode as a guest or in discussion.

Key moment at : "" –

item.title: John Kobylt Show & John Kobylt Radio: This episode of the John Kobylt Show focuses on criticizing Los Angeles Mayor Ka
item.description:
John Kobylt Show & John Kobylt Radio
"Mayor Karen Bass Refuses To Enforce Homeless Laws In LA" – Published 2026-03-31

Match: Karen Bass (guest)

Sentiment: Negative

This episode of the John Kobylt Show focuses on criticizing Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass for not enforcing existing laws to forcibly remove homeless individuals from dangerous living situations, specifically referencing a woman living in storm drains. The hosts argue that Bass refuses to use available legal mechanisms like 5150 holds despite having the authority to do so.

Key moment at 09:30: "Sick psycho. Karen Bass is a sick psycho." – John Kobylt

▶ Watch Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript

item.title: David Pakman Show: This episode covers various political topics including CPAC vs No Kings protests
item.description:
David Pakman Show
"No Kings vs CPAC did not go well" – Published 2026-03-30

Match: Karen Bass (guest)

Sentiment: Positive

This episode covers various political topics including CPAC vs No Kings protests, Trump's declining performance, and features an interview with Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass discussing her strategies for addressing homelessness and crime in LA.

Key moment at 45:48: "Street homelessness has decreased by 17%." – Karen Bass

▶ Watch Episode

item.title: FOX 11 Los Angeles: Spencer Pratt appears as a guest on FOX 11 Los Angeles to discuss his candidacy
item.description:
FOX 11 Los Angeles
"Spencer Pratt makes case to be next LA Mayor" – Published 2026-03-27

Match: Spencer Pratt (guest)

Sentiment: Mixed

Spencer Pratt appears as a guest on FOX 11 Los Angeles to discuss his candidacy for Los Angeles Mayor. He makes his case for why he should replace incumbent Karen Bass, focusing on his response to the Palisades Fire and his outsider status.

Key moment at 14:37: "I'm deadly serious. I had 12 neighbors die in my neighborhood across the street from my house." – Spencer Pratt

▶ Watch Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript
